title: Bind T1 PM verdicts to the exact PR head SHA in Merge Gate

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Rebased onto main@c16054ba (post UTV2-1554 bootstrap merge). scripts/ops/merge-gate-verdict.cjs, scripts/ops/merge-gate-verdict.test.ts, eslint.config.mjs, package.json, and docs/05_operations/schemas/pm-verdict-v1.md are no longer part of this PR's diff -- UTV2-1554 landed the canonical (superset, includes the trust-boundary fix) versions of all five on main first, specifically so this PR never needs to introduce them. The self-referential bootstrap-recovery step this PR previously needed (recovering merge-gate-verdict.cjs from the PR's own head SHA when absent at base) has been removed entirely, since base.sha now always has the trusted file. See docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-1543/diff-summary.md for the full accounting.

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

unit_tests_inherited_from_main.note: Not part of this PR's diff -- supplied unchanged by UTV2-1554 on main (16 original + 4 UTV2-1554 trust-boundary regression tests). Confirmed passing on this branch since main's copy is used unchanged.

unit_tests_updated.note: The prior 'UTV2-1543 bootstrap: merge-gate.yml recovers merge-gate-verdict.cjs from the PR head' test was replaced with a new regression assertion that the gate job never fetches or executes content keyed on pull_request.head.sha, and carries no PR-head bootstrap-recovery step at all.

lint.note: No eslint.config.mjs change in this PR's diff -- the **/*.cjs override was supplied unchanged by UTV2-1554 on main.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane changes only Merge Gate workflow logic and a pure CommonJS module; no production code path or migration touched. Live smoke run regardless per T1 policy.

acceptance_criteria.utv2_1554_rebase_stage2_complete: PASS -- rebased onto main containing the trusted helper; own copy of merge-gate-verdict.cjs/.test.ts/eslint/package.json/pm-verdict-v1.md removed from this PR's diff
acceptance_criteria.pr_head_bootstrap_fallback_removed_entir: PASS -- the Bootstrap step is deleted from merge-gate.yml; base.sha always has the trusted file post-UTV2-1554
acceptance_criteria.regression_assertion_pr_head_sha_never_f: PASS -- scripts/ops/workflow-hardening.test.ts new test asserts no checkout/run/script step in the gate job resolves or materializes content keyed on pull_request.head.sha, and no bootstrap-recovery step exists
